title: windows-azd-shellout probe result envelope
description: Schema for the JSON object emitted by scripts/isolation/windows-azd-shellout/probe.ps1. The probe asserts that azd, when invoked with AZURE_CONFIG_DIR + AZD_CONFIG_DIR set, does not write into $HOME/.azure or $HOME/.azd during config-only flows that shell out to az. See docs/isolation-matrix.md#6 for context.

examples.hypothesis: azd preserves AZURE_CONFIG_DIR and AZD_CONFIG_DIR when shelling out to az during a config-only flow; $HOME/.azure and $HOME/.azd are untouched.
examples.expected: After 'azd config show' + 'azd version' with both env vars set: $T_azure and $T_azd are populated (or at least mtime-touched); $HOME/.azure and $HOME/.azd mtimes are unchanged; azd exit code is 0.
examples.actual: tempAzureFiles=0; tempAzdFiles=2; newHomeAzureFiles=0; newHomeAzdFiles=0; homeAzureMtimeUnchanged=True; homeAzdMtimeUnchanged=True; azdConfigExit=0; azdVersionExit=0
notes: FOLLOW-UP: this probe does NOT cover 'azd auth login' (interactive). That remains a manual smoke test per docs/isolation-matrix.md#6.

examples.hypothesis: azd preserves AZURE_CONFIG_DIR and AZD_CONFIG_DIR when shelling out to az during a config-only flow; $HOME/.azure and $HOME/.azd are untouched.
examples.expected: After 'azd config show' + 'azd version' with both env vars set: $T_azure and $T_azd are populated (or at least mtime-touched); $HOME/.azure and $HOME/.azd mtimes are unchanged; azd exit code is 0.
examples.skip_reason: azd CLI not found on PATH
